title: Launch station 2349
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Launch station 2349''' was a docking bay on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] docked the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] there shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], after concluding his search for [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] fighter.

==Appearances==
*''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''
